pi_items.source: Task description (line 5 of task.json): 'identify requests that are in the "To Submit" (Draft) status'. Setup script (setup_task.sh, lines 110-112) creates stale_draft_ids with status='draft'. Verifier (verifier.py, lines 42-46) confirms deletion of draft-status requests.

Task description (line 5 of task.json): 'Start Date strictly before today'. Setup script creates stale_draft_ids with date offsets of -30, -15, and -5 days (all past dates). Verifier checks these past-dated draft records are deleted.

privileged_info_summary: The purge_stale_leave_requests task targets Odoo hr.leave records with two specific criteria: (1) status='draft' (To Submit state), and (2) start_date strictly before today. The task setup creates 3 stale draft leave requests at past dates (-30, -15, -5 days), 2 future draft requests (+10, +20 days), and 4 confirmed/approved requests (past and future) as control records. The verifier confirms success by checking that stale drafts are deleted while all other records are preserved. Data is synthetic, generated via Odoo XML-RPC API during task setup.
